notes: New itemised VAT bill layout: each line now shows No, Item, Qty, Price, VAT amount, VAT %, and line Total, with Total / VAT / Gross Total right-aligned and decimals lined up (works on both plain and Arabic/bilingual printers). Credit bills now print the customer's account: Previous Balance, This Bill, and Total Outstanding, so the pending amount is on the printed receipt. Extra spacing above the thank-you line. Plus an optional hands-free Voice Cart Entry add-on for source installs.
